title: Gemma 4: Your Laptop's NEW AI Powerhouse! Open & Free! #shorts
summary: Gemma 4 is an open-source frontier AI model with Apache 2.0 licensing designed to run on laptops. It features a unified architecture intended for accessible deployment on consumer hardware.
